summary: Cross-ref MPI-246 (aa958869): the same PATH_INPUTS heal block now has a per-node exclusion — UltralyticsDetectorProvider.model_name is skipped in BOTH directions via SLASH_ONLY_NODE_TYPES. Does NOT touch lora_name/upscale_model/vae_name/clip_name — MPI-198s baked-LoRA Linux/mac fix is unaffected. When live-verifying on a Linux portable build, an Ultralytics automask workflow should also pass.
